name: Hyatt Regency Maui Resort & Spa
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
description: Luxurious Accommodations with Stunning Views Indulge in contemporary Hawaiian decor and modern amenities at our Ka’anapali resort. Each room features a private lanai and picturesque views from a private balcony. Enjoy a comfortable stay with air conditioning, flat-screen TV, and a coffee machine. The en suite bathroom offers a touch of luxury with a bathrobe and hairdryer. World-Class Dining and Entertainment Savor a culinary journey at our 5 on-site restaurants, from fine dining at Japengo to locally-sourced cuisine at Son'z Maui Swan Court. Experience traditional Polynesian dance at The Drums of the Pacific Lu’au and enjoy a lavish breakfast buffet at the open-air Swan Court. Relaxation an
importantInfo: The daily resort fee of $49 plus taxes includes the following. • Two in-room prefilled reusable water bottles • Purified water and ice machines throughout resort • 24-hour access to oceanfront Moana Athletic Gym • Cultural programs including lei making, hula lessons, mermaid story time, wildlife tours, and koi feedings • Local, 1-800/1-888 phone calls • In-room Keurig coffee and tea • In-room safe • Concierge services • Daily yoga/fitness classes • Resort shuttle service in Ka’anapali • Unlimited tennis, pickle ball or basketball court time; equipment included • Welcome Lei upon arrival • On site Beach portrait session and 5X7 print from • Grins2Go • Personalized guest request texting service: TEXT 808 • 219 0608 for 24-hour assistance • 15% off non-discounted green fees at Ka’anapali Golf • Courses • 10% discount on all non-sale apparel items at the • Ka’anapali Golf Courses Pro Shop • 24-hour access to automatic pool towel stations throughout resort • Backpack beach chair usage for all guestroom occupantsGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. name: OUTRIGGER Kāʻanapali Beach Resort
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Prime Location & Views Situated on Ka'anapali Beach, guests can enjoy stunning views of the ocean, garden, and pool from every room. Cultural Activities & Entertainment Experience daily hula shows, dinner theater performances, lei making, and more, embracing the rich Hawaiian culture. Convenient Amenities & Recreational Activities Enjoy modern comforts like free WiFi, air conditioning, on-site restaurants, and outdoor pool, while having easy access to exciting activities like whale watching and surfing. Book your stay at OUTRIGGER Kāʻanapali Beach Resort and immerse yourself in the true spirit of Hawaii today!
importantInfo: We have live entertainment every evening at Maui Brewing Company from 6-8pm daily and all of our Signature rooms and suites are recently renovated.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. People 3 years old and over stay for US$40 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

name: Royal Lahaina Resort & Bungalows
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
description: Luxurious Beachfront Location Discover the Royal Lahaina Resort & Bungalows, an exclusive oasis on the pristine Kaanapali Beach in Lahaina, Hawaii. Indulge in beachfront bliss with 3 pools, a hot tub, and a fitness centre. Charming Accommodations and Amenities Relax in guest rooms featuring free WiFi, cable TV, and coffee machines. Enjoy the full-service restaurant, ice cream parlor, and lei-making classes at the resort. Immerse yourself in Hawaiian arts and crafts at this tropical paradise. Convenient Access to Attractions Explore Historic Old Lahaina and Haleakala Crater with ease from the resort. Take advantage of the free shuttle to Whaler’s Village for a shopping and dining excursio
importantInfo: Royal Lahaina Resort is a nonsmoking property. Smoking is permitted only in designated smoking areas. This hotel uses advanced smoking detection sensors that monitor for and specifically detect smoke. If smoking occurs during your stay, a smoking fee of $500 will Automatically be applied to your account. This includes cigarettes, Marijuana, Vapes, E-Cigs, etc.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in all areas and is free of charge.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and costs USD 35 per day.

policies.name: Pets
policies.description: Pets are allowed. Charges may be applicable.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 9 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. People no matter the age stay for US$90 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

name: The Westin Maui Resort & Spa, Ka'anapali
description: Luxurious Spa and Recreational Amenities Indulge in massages and facials at the full-service spa, enjoy 3 outdoor pools, a waterslide, and a 24-hour fitness center for relaxation and fun. Diverse Dining Options and Entertainment Savor Hawaiian cuisine at Waicoco or opt for room service, with a poolside bar and 2 lounges for refreshing drinks. Snacks available at the coffee shop/cafe for your enjoyment. Convenience and Comfort Featuring a 24-hour business center, concierge services, and a hair salon, this hotel ensures a seamless stay. Chance to unwind in 759 rooms with lanais, pillowtop beds, and modern amenities. When you stay at The Westin Maui Resort & Spa, Ka'anapali, experience beac
importantInfo: Reservations are required for golf tee times, massage services, and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the hotel prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. Up to 2 children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. Guests can arrange to bring pets by contacting the property directly, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. A car is not required for transportation to and from this property. Cashless payment methods are available for all transactions. Contactless check-in and contactless check-out are available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

name: Sheraton Maui Resort & Spa
facilities: Guest education on local ecosystems and culture
Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
description: Luxurious Accommodations The Sheraton Maui Resort & Spa offers beautifully decorated guest rooms with tropical themes and Hawaiian artwork. Each room is equipped with modern amenities including air conditioning, flat screen TV, and a refrigerator. Dining and Entertainment Indulge in a culinary journey at one of the 5 restaurants and bars on-site. From craft cocktails at The Sandbar to nightly cliff diving ceremonies at The Cliff Dive Grill, there is something for every palate. Recreational Activities Experience the best of Maui with a range of activities such as hula dancing classes, scuba diving lessons, and oceanfront massages at the full-service spa. Additionally, guests can enjoy a s
importantInfo: If applicable, the resort credit can be used towards food and beverage charges." Daily Resort Fee includes: -Daily Enhanced High-Speed Internet Access -Daily Cultural Activities (Hula Lessons, Lei Making, Fire Knife Show, Hawaiian Lawn Activities) for 2ppl -Daily Use of Pickleball Courts – Includes Paddle Rental and Balls for 2ppl -Daily Use of Tennis Courts – Includes Tennis Racket Rental and Tennis Balls for 2ppl -Welcome Shell Lei for 2ppl upon arrival -(2) Logo’s Refillable Water bottle Outdoor Fitness Activities (yoga/fitness training) for 2 guests daily (2 classes provided per day)Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In the event of an early departure, the property will charge you the full amount for your stay. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and is free of charge.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 9 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 3 years old stay for free when using an available cot. People no matter the age stay for US$30 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Public parking is possible on site (reservation is not possible) and costs USD 39 per day.

description: Luxurious Amenities Indulge in onsite massages, body treatments, and facials. Enjoy 4 outdoor pools, 2 spa tubs, and a fitness center. Dining Experience Savor delicious meals at the beachfront Sea House Restaurant with a bar/lounge for a perfect evening. Convenience and Comfort 163 air-conditioned rooms featuring premium bedding, private lanais, and complimentary Wi-Fi. Plus, amenities like a 24-hour front desk and multilingual staff for a seamless stay. To experience all this and more at Napili Kai Beach Resort, book now for an unforgettable getaway by the ocean.
importantInfo: Reservations are required for golf tee times, massage services, and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the hotel prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. A car is recommended for transportation to and from this property.

name: Napili Shores Maui by OUTRIGGER - No Resort & Housekeeping Fees
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
Property cleaned by professional cleaning companies
Screens / Barriers between staff and guests for safety
description: Luxurious Suites with Modern Amenities Napili Shores Maui by OUTRIGGER offers fully-equipped suites with modern kitchens, flat-screen TVs, and ceiling fans for a comfortable stay. Oceanfront Dining Experience Indulge in delicious breakfast and lunch specialties at the popular Gazebo restaurant on-site, featuring mouthwatering dishes like white chocolate macadamia nut pancakes and Portuguese sausage fried rice. Abundant Recreational Activities From swimming pools and hot tubs to croquet, shuffleboard, and snorkeling at Water Works Sports, guests can enjoy a wide range of activities without any resort or housekeeping fees. Experience the ultimate blend of luxury and relaxation at Napili Shores
importantInfo: If traveling with children, please indicate the ages of each child in the special requests comment field when booking your stay at Napili Shores Maui by OUTRIGGER. ***Please note: The reception is open from 09:00 to 17:00. If guests plan to arrive outside of these hours, please contact the property in advance to make special arrangements.***Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. This property does not accommodate bachelor(ette) or similar parties. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Escape to paradise at Aston Maui Kaanapali Villas, where stunning beach views and luxurious comfort await you. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind at our full-service spa or dive into relaxation with two outdoor swimming pools and hot tubs, complemented by a state-of-the-art 24-hour fitness center designed to rejuvenate you. Gourmet Dining Experience Savor delectable cuisine at Castaway Restaurant, with cooked-to-order breakfasts and refreshing drinks available at our poolside bar, transforming each meal into a pleasant culinary escape. Luxury Accommodations Retreat to one of our 183 air-conditioned rooms, featuring plush pillowtop beds with Egyptian cotton sheets, private balconies, and LCD te
importantInfo: Pool access available from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. A car is not required for transportation to and from this property. The property is professionally cleaned.

name: Aston Maui Kaanapali Villas
facilities: Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Tropical Oasis on Maui's Shores Luxurious Amenities: Experience ultimate relaxation with 2 adult pools, a day spa, and a poolside restaurant offering Island cuisine and an extensive wine list. Home Away From Home: Enjoy Cable TV, a private balcony, and a refrigerator in every room. Opt for a studio or suite for a full kitchen for added convenience. Family-Friendly Fun: Kids will love the children’s pool and the free beach ball at check-in. Stay active at the 24-hour Fitness Center or hop on the free shuttle for transfers to Kaanapali Resort area. Book now to experience the perfect blend of luxury and comfort at Aston Maui Kaanapali Villas.
importantInfo: The daily Amenity Fee (Resort Fee) of USD 35+taxes includes - Daily Pool and Beach Towels - Daily Coffee, tea and Hot chocolate - Fitness Center - Kaanapali Trolley to and from Whalers Village - Parking for the first vehicle (second parking pass is an additional $10 per car) Departure cleaning is included. Guests also receive an amenity refresh and tidy service on every 3rd day of stay. Additional housekeeping, beyond the 3rd day service, is available for a fee. The property collects Damage Waiver Fee (Service Fee) of USD 39.99+taxes. Mandatory Damage Waiver Fee (Service Fee) is not refundableGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in all areas and charges are applicable.

policies.name: Groups
policies.description: When booking more than 10 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed) and charges may be applicable.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for free when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. People no matter the age stay for US$30 per person per night when using an available extra bed. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

name: Kapalua Villas Maui
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
Property cleaned by professional cleaning companies
Screens / Barriers between staff and guests for safety
description: Luxurious Villas with Stunning Views Enjoy the modern tropical décor and panoramic ocean views from your villa's balcony. Stay connected with WiFi and unwind with cable TV, while the fully equipped kitchen and en suite bathroom provide ultimate convenience. Unmatched Amenities and Activities The concierge can assist in booking exciting catamaran tours, snorkeling, and scuba diving activities. Play golf at the championship courses or enjoy complimentary court time at the Kapalua Tennis Garden. Culinary Delights and Convenience Indulge in regional Hawaii cuisine at Merriman's Kapalua or savor Pacific Rim dishes at Sansei Seafood Restaurant & Sushi Bar. For groceries and specialty take-out
importantInfo: A daily resort fee will be applicable per villa unit and will be collected directly from the guest upon check-out. Daily resort fee is excluded from the room rate. Resort fee includes the following: - unlimited wired and Wi-Fi internet in the guest rooms - safety deposit box - self parking - use of tennis facilities. If traveling with children, please indicate the ages of each child in the special requests comment field when making reservations. Baby cribs are available through outside vendor. Please contact property for details.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

description: Discover paradise at The Westin Nanea Ocean Villas, Ka'anapali, where beachside luxury meets comfort and style. Relaxation Awaits Dive into bliss with our 2 stunning outdoor swimming pools and 3 rejuvenating hot tubs, complete with a sauna for ultimate relaxation. Culinary Delights Savor the flavors of Hawaii at our on-site dining options, including Mauka Makai and vibrant poolside bars, perfect for unwinding after a day in the sun. Home Away From Home Choose from 390 beautifully furnished guestrooms, featuring fully equipped kitchens and premium bedding, ensuring you feel right at home with spectacular views from your private lanai. Unveil the magic of Ka'anapali and book your stay today!

name: Grand Wailea Maui, A Waldorf Astoria Resort
description: Luxurious Spa and Recreation Indulge in massages and facials at the full-service spa. Enjoy 9 outdoor pools, a waterslide, and a sauna for ultimate relaxation. Dining and Entertainment Choose from 5 restaurants, room service, and various bars for your culinary needs. Stay entertained with swim-up bar, lounge, and poolside bars. Amenities and Events Benefit from complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, and gift shops. Host events in the 28000 sq ft space with conference facilities and meeting rooms. Ready to experience paradise at Grand Wailea Maui, A Waldorf Astoria Resort?
importantInfo: Reservations are required for golf tee times. Reservations can be made by contacting the resort prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. Guests can arrange to bring pets by contacting the property directly, using the contact information on the booking confirmation (surcharges apply and can be found in the Fees section). Cashless payment methods are available for all transactions and guests can access their rooms with a mobile device. Contactless check-in and contactless check-out are available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

description: Tropical Paradise Setting Located on a 28-acre coconut grove, Hilton Grand Vacations Club Maui Bay Villas offers a true tropical paradise experience in Kihei, Hawaii. Enjoy island-style food, hula demonstrations, and just a 3-minute walk to Kalepolepo Beach Park. Comfortable Accommodations The spacious rooms at the hotel are adorned in vibrant tropical colors, equipped with cable TV, a refrigerator, and an in-room safe for your convenience and relaxation. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by taking a dip in the outdoor pool or make use of the outdoor barbecue facilities available on-site. With the Hawaiian Island Humpback Whale Sanctuary just a short walk away, and Elleair Maui Golf Club with

Special requests cannot be guaranteed and may incur additional charges. Daily Resort Charge will be added to the room rate and includes: Guest internet access; self-parking; InnSpire to access apps & stream media to TV from own device; 2, 16oz water bottles per day; domestic long distance calls (30 min a day). Construction work is scheduled Monday–Friday, between 8 a.m. and 5 p.m., with occasional weekend work. name: Wailea Elua- CoralTree Residence Collection
description: Escape to Wailea Elua - CoralTree Residence Collection, where paradise meets comfort in the heart of Kihei. Recreation and Relaxation Dive into one of our two stunning outdoor swimming pools or stay active in our fully equipped fitness center. With lush tropical surroundings, you’ll find the perfect way to unwind. Home-Away-From-Home Our 152 individually decorated spacious guestrooms come with fully equipped kitchens, including refrigerators and ovens. Enjoy the comfort of private lanais, complemented by complimentary wired and wireless internet access. Convenient Amenities Experience seamless stay with conveniences such as laundry facilities, a library for quiet reading, and free self-parki
importantInfo: A car is recommended for transportation to and from this property.

name: Hotel Wailea, Relais & Châteaux - Adults Only
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
description: Luxurious Suites with Ocean Views Experience the ultimate comfort in our spacious suites at Hotel Wailea, each equipped with free WiFi and a private deck offering breathtaking views of the ocean or garden. Relax in plush bathrobes and unwind in deep soaking tubs for a truly luxurious stay. Beach Services and Culinary Delights Indulge in complimentary beach services including bottled water, beach chairs, and umbrellas while soaking in the stunning ocean views. Treat your taste buds to island-to-table cuisine at The Restaurant, with two unique dining settings - The Lanai for sunset views and The Garden for al fresco dining amidst lush gardens. Exclusive Dining Experience at The Treehouse Eleva
importantInfo: Resort fee includes: Valet or self-parking services Lei greeting with champagne toast Activities and experiences, including fitness and yoga classes, mixology classes, outrigger canoe excursions and other seasonal or pop-up offerings 24-hour access to open-air Fitness Studio boasting three-island ocean views featuring Peloton stationary bike and top-of-the-line equipment from Technogym and PENT. Fitness Aerial yoga studio featuring ocean views and offering complimentary fitness classes Luxury vehicle shuttle service within the Wailea area Beach concierge to provide you with beach chairs, umbrella, towels and water along with transportation to any beach in the Wailea area (Luxe Beach Picnic available for a fee). Concierge dedicated to securing preferred dining reservations, arranging ocean activities and making the most of your Wailea vacation Private cabanas on a first come first served basis (reservations available for a fee) In-suite nonalcoholic beverages High-speed Wi-Fi throughout the hotelGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of you

name: Wailea Beach Resort - Marriott, Maui
description: Luxurious Accommodations Experience the beauty of Hawaii at Wailea Beach Resort - Marriott, Maui, offering stunning ocean views and upscale rooms with balconies, AC, and modern amenities. Diverse Dining Options Indulge in a variety of culinary delights at KAPA Bar & Grill, HUMBLE MARKET KITCHIN, and more, including beachside bars and grab-and-go options like Mo Bettah Food Truck. Recreational Activities Unwind at the spacious pools, some with water slides, or enjoy scuba diving in the dive pool. Explore nearby beaches, golf courses, and the hotel's on-site spa for a truly relaxing stay. Book now to immerse yourself in the ultimate Hawaiian getaway at Wailea Beach Resort - Marriott, Maui.
importantInfo: This breakfast information applies only if you book a rate with breakfast included and the rate you booked might not include breakfast: If you book a rate with breakfast included, the person booking the rate will get a buffet breakfast for up to 2 adults. Please contact customer service or the hotel directly if you have questions about which rate you booked. Please note that these inclusions are part of a fee that the guest should know about prior to making a reservation. They are not packageable components as they are provided to all guests & not optional. The disclosure of what the fee includes, should be displayed so the guest can understand the fee. Please add to the Fine Print: The daily Resort fee includes the following: -> Welcome Mai Tai for 2 guests -> Daily 2 Beach Chairs, umbrella set up, and water service at Wailea Beach -> Daily Hawaiian Cultural Activities - Hula lessons, ukulele lessons, lei and bracelet making, poi pounding, Hawaiian cultural games, and lessons in Hawaiian values and language for 2 guests -> Daily Shuttle Rides within Wailea -> Introductory Scuba lesson for 2 guests daily -> Orchid & kukui nut lei greeting with passion orange guava juice, presented

description: Beachfront Paradise at Aston Maui Banyan Tropical Beach Style Units : Experience comfort in our units featuring a balcony, TV, coffee machine, and more. Exciting Amenities : Enjoy the outdoor pool, hot tub, tennis court, and BBQ facilities during your stay. Convenient Location : Just steps away from Kamaole Beach Park II and close to shopping centers and golf courses. Ready to experience paradise? Book your stay at Aston at the Maui Banyan now!
importantInfo: All guests checking in between the hours of 22:00 to 8:00. in the morning. Please use the Aston courtesy phone located on the outside wall of the lobby. The courtesy phone will connect you with a guest services agent who will assist you with checking in. Temporary Road Closure: Due to storms earlier this year, South Kihei Road is closed north of Aston at the Maui Banyan. Guest rooms are thoroughly cleaned upon departure only. Housekeeping is available upon request for an additional fee. Please note: the type of bedding is not guaranteed. Service Charge consists of a Reservation Process Fee and a Damage Waiver FeeGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and is free of charge.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 11 years old stay for free when using an existing bed. Children from 12 years old to 17 years old stay for US$35 per person per night when using an existing bed. You haven't added any cots. You haven't added any extra beds. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

rooms.name: Two-Bedroom Apartment
rooms.summary: The apartment's kitchen, which features a microwave, is available for cooking and storing food. The apartment offers air conditioning.

name: Makena Surf- CoralTree Residence Collection
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
description: Beachfront Paradise Experience luxury at CoralTree Residence Collection overlooking Paipu Beach. Luxurious Apartments Indulge in spacious apartments with ocean views, modern amenities, and fully equipped kitchens. Exclusive Amenities Enjoy 2 outdoor pools, 4 tennis courts, a BBQ area, herb gardens, and personalized services including a private chef and 24-hour staff. Ready to elevate your Maui getaway? Book now at CoralTree Residence Collection, A Destination Residence by Hyatt.
importantInfo: Guests are required to show a photo identification and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform Makena Surf- CoralTree Residence Collection in advance of your expected arrival time. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly with the contact details provided in your confirmation. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian.
